{{Quote|Thanks for the assist at Nomlis III. Our Storm Unit wouldn't have made it out safely, if it hadn't been for you. A sincere salute to you.|Paling to Ace Azzameen|<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''</ref>}}
[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Paling''' was member of the [[Nighthawks]] and participated in the [[Battle of Nomlis III|assault]] at [[Nomlis III]]. After the successful mission, they sent a thankful [[e-mail]] to [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
